description_long: This filing cabinet features a rectangular, boxy structure with a dark, metallic top and brown, wood-like panels on the sides and front. The top surface appears to be made of a matte-finished metal, possibly steel, with a subtle sheen and visible texture. The front face is divided into three vertical sections, each likely corresponding to a drawer, separated by black vertical bands that may serve as structural supports or drawer dividers. A small, rectangular tab or latch is visible at the center of the top edge on the front, suggesting a locking or opening mechanism. The sides are plain, with the same brown paneling and a slight overhang from the top. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for storing documents or items in an urban or office environment.
description: A rectangular filing cabinet with a dark metallic top and brown paneled sides and front, featuring three vertical drawer sections and a central latch.
description_view_0: Front view showing three brown vertical drawer sections separated by black bands and a central latch at the top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain brown panel with the overhanging dark metallic top.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view with three brown panels and a central black tab, similar to the front but less detailed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain brown panel and the overhanging dark metallic top, mirroring view 1.
